Oracle Events
OE 1: Search Linear for Dmitri's audit-related tickets using linear_list_issues (assignee: "Dmitri Volkov", or queries: "duplicate detection", "audit", "validation", "schema test", "expense"). Discover ENG-220 (duplicate detection, state_todo, significantly overdue — due 2026-03-25), ENG-216 (audit, state_in_progress but work is done), ENG-212 (edge case tests, state_in_progress, partially complete). Also discover related tickets: ENG-217 (pipeline hardening, state_in_progress), ENG-218 (dashboard validation, state_in_progress), ENG-219 (launch readiness checklist, state_todo), ENG-214/215 (config fixes).Read/lookup action. linear_list_issues is a non-default tool and query is non-trivial (must search by assignee AND multiple keywords) then TS yes, QC yes.
OE 2: Read Linear comments on key tickets using linear_list_comments (issueId: issue_stipend_duplicate_detection, issue_audit_expenses, issue_edge_cases_backlog, issue_pipeline_hardening, issue_launch_readiness_checklist). Discover Dmitri's original duplicate receipt findings, Lena's deploy verification, Samira's remediation timeline, and Dmitri's schema test completion notes.Read/lookup action. linear_list_comments is a non-default tool and query is obvious (issueId from prior discovery) then TS yes, QC no.
OE 3: Search Slack for audit follow-up and re-enablement discussions using conversations_search_messages (queries: "duplicate detection", "re-enable", "TechComfort", "receipt fraud", "ExpenseBot", "validation gaps"). Also read #engineering (C003) channel history. Discover Samira's remediation plan, Elena's directive, re-enablement discussion context, and whether anyone confirmed validation gaps are closed.
Read/lookup action. conversations_search_messages and conversations_history are default tools and queries are obvious then skip TS, skip QC.
OE 4: Search emails for audit correspondence and client follow-up using search_emails (queries: "TechComfort", "receipt fraud", "Andre Washington", "Kevin Tran", "Jordan Ekwueme", "audit", "re-enable"). Discover Dmitri's email to Marcus about duplicate receipts, Marcus's response about QuickBooks holds (STIP-2026-0094, 0097), and whether AMs (Mina, Emeka) sent verification emails to client HR teams.Read/lookup action. search_emails is a default tool and any keyword finds data then skip TS, skip QC.
OE 5: Search Airtable for flagged stipend records using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: "Stipend Transactions", field_name: "Employee Name", value: "Kevin Tran" / "Andre Washington" / "Jordan Ekwueme"). Discover current hold statuses: Kevin Tran $89 (Approved/Paid), Andre Washington $89 (Pending Approval — still on hold since 2026-02-20 with no resolution), Jordan Ekwueme $45 (Pending Approval — still on hold since 2026-02-20 with no resolution).Read/lookup action. airtable_search_records is a non-default tool and bad query could miss data (need correct table and field) then TS yes, QC yes.
OE 6: Look up Samira's contact details using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Samira"). Find samira.tariq@moveops.com.Read/lookup action. contacts_search_contacts is a default tool and query is obvious then skip TS, skip QC.
OE 7: Update ENG-220 (duplicate detection) ticket with findings using linear_create_comment (issueId: issue_stipend_duplicate_detection). Comment should document: ticket is still Todo and significantly overdue (due 2026-03-25), no implementation started, receipt holds still sitting in Airtable unresolved, AM client verification not confirmed, $100 threshold not implemented.Write action then Outcome rubric.
Outcome 1.1: "linear_create_comment was called on issue_stipend_duplicate_detection (ENG-220)."
Outcome 1.2: "The comment mentions that the ticket is still in Todo or has not been started (or similar)."
OE 8: Update ENG-212 (edge case tests) ticket with findings using linear_create_comment (issueId: issue_edge_cases_backlog). Comment should document: 6 schema validation tests completed, but categorization edge cases (vendor abbreviations, ergo vs furniture, bundled items) still incomplete.Write action then Outcome rubric.
Outcome 1.1: "linear_create_comment was called on issue_edge_cases_backlog (ENG-212)."
OE 9: Update ENG-216 (audit) ticket with findings using linear_create_comment or linear_update_issue (issueId: issue_audit_expenses). Comment should document audit completion and post-audit remediation status. Optionally mark as Done since the audit deliverables were completed.Write action then Outcome rubric.
Outcome 1.1: "linear_create_comment or linear_update_issue was called on issue_audit_expenses (ENG-216)."
OE 10: Flag relaunch concerns to Samira using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C003/#engineering) or send_email (to: samira.tariq@moveops.com, from: dmitri.volkov@moveops.com). The message must state that the system is not ready for relaunch and identify specific open blockers. Write action then Outcome rubric.
Outcome 1.1: "conversations_add_message was called to post in #engineering (C003), OR send_email was called to samira.tariq@moveops.com."
Outcome 1.2: "The message states the system is not ready for relaunch (or similar)."
Outcome 1.2: "The message identifies ENG-220 (duplicate detection) as an open blocker (or similar)."
OE 11 (Key finding Outcome 2.1): The agent discovers and reports that ENG-220 (duplicate detection) is still in Todo state with zero implementation, significantly overdue (due 2026-03-25). Outcome 2.1: "The final response reports that ENG-220 is still in Todo or has not been started."
OE 12 (Key finding Outcome 2.1): The agent discovers and reports the current status of the TechComfort receipt holds — Andre Washington's $89 and Jordan Ekwueme's $45 are still in "Pending Approval" in Airtable since 2026-02-20 with no resolution.Outcome 2.1: "The final response reports that the receipt holds for Andre Washington and/or Jordan Ekwueme are still unresolved (or similar)."
OE 13 (Key finding Outcome 2.1): The agent discovers and reports that Kevin Tran's $89 keyboard receipt was verified as legitimate (confirmed through Vectral HR during the contract renewal process). Outcome 2.1: "The final response reports that Kevin Tran's receipt was verified legitimate (or similar)."
OE 14 (Key finding Outcome 2.1): The agent discovers and reports that the $100 manual review threshold from Elena's CEO directive has not been implemented in the DecisionEngine. Outcome 2.1: "The final response mentions the $100 threshold has not been implemented (or similar)."
OE 15 (Key finding Outcome 2.1): The agent discovers and reports that ENG-219 (launch readiness checklist) is still in Todo the formal gate Samira committed to was never created. Outcome 2.1: "The final response reports that the launch readiness checklist (ENG-219) has not been started (or similar)."
OE 16 (Key finding Outcome 2.1): The agent discovers and reports that ENG-217 (pipeline hardening) status is unclear still marked In Progress with no confirmed completion of the acceptance criteria (silent fallback removal, type enforcement, schema validation gate). Outcome 2.1: "The final response reports that ENG-217 pipeline hardening status is unclear or unconfirmed (or similar)."

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

6 The message to Samira states that the system is not ready for relaunch (or similar such as 'should not relaunch' or 'blockers remain')
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The Samira message explicitly states 'the data shows we are not ready' and concludes 'we will be relaunching with the same validation gaps that caused the original incident.'
✓Run #2The Slack message to Samira explicitly states: 'We should not re-enable automation until these are resolved' and 'If we re-enable automation now, we're relying on the same process that failed the first time.'
